name: Phoebe's Diner
notes: Chef/Partner. Multiple Austin locations. Owner LinkedIn confirmed; no direct personal email publicly available.

name: 24 Diner
notes: Chef-inspired comfort food diner. Owner identified; LinkedIn URL not publicly listed; only generic info@24diner.com available.

name: Nayar Taqueria
notes: Family-owned Mexican restaurant. SE Portland location. Owner name not publicly available.

name: Ole Ole Taqueria
notes: Family-owned since 2000. 2137 E Burnside location. Owner names from 2001 article; LinkedIn/direct emails not available.

name: Santo Domingo Taqueria
notes: Authentic Oaxacan restaurant, 5447 NE 42nd Ave. Owner names confirmed; LinkedIn/personal emails not available.

name: The Village at Italian Village
notes: Fourth-generation family restaurant. Gina Capitanini is VP/President. Owner LinkedIn confirmed; direct personal email masked in public records.

name: Espresso Vivace
notes: Co-founder with Geneva Sullivan (1988). Iconic coffee roaster. Owner name confirmed; LinkedIn URL not publicly listed.

name: Bain BBQ
notes: Texas-style BBQ, 993 S Cooper St. Owner name and LinkedIn not publicly available.

name: L&B Spumoni Gardens
notes: Family-owned Sicilian pizza since 1939. Toni Corey is granddaughter/current owner. No LinkedIn or direct email found.

name: China Live
notes: Co-founded with Cindy Chen. Award-winning Chinese restaurant, Chinatown. Owner LinkedIn confirmed; direct email not available.

name: Flour Bakery + Cafe
notes: James Beard Award-winner. Co-owner with husband Christopher Myers. LinkedIn URL not publicly listed; no direct email available.

name: Tandem Coffee Roasters
notes: Co-founder with husband Will (2012). Independent coffee roaster. Owner LinkedIn confirmed; no direct personal email available.

name: Guelaguetza
notes: Michelin-recognized Oaxacan restaurant, co-owned with siblings Fernando Jr. and Bricia. Owner LinkedIn confirmed; no direct personal email.

name: Mercantile Denver
notes: James Beard-winner chef-owner at Union Station. Sold majority stake to Sage Hospitality (2024). No LinkedIn or direct email available.

name: Royal China
notes: Family-owned Chinese restaurant, co-owned with husband George. 50+ year legacy. No LinkedIn or direct email found.

name: Bom Dia Cafe
notes: Owner, tropically-inspired acai cafe, 47 India St. Opened March 2024. No LinkedIn or direct email found in public sources.
